message:
feat(workflows): triggers, failure handlers, and control flow steps (wa-upg.2.7)

Extend the descriptor-driven workflow language with activation triggers
and structured control flow:

Triggers:
- DescriptorTrigger with event types, agent types, and rule IDs
- Workflows can now activate on specific events, not just manual invocation

Failure Handling:
- DescriptorFailureHandler enum: Notify, Log, Abort
- Message interpolation with \${failed_step} for context-rich error handling
- Graceful recovery without silent failures

Control Flow Steps:
- Notify: send notification messages (logged, not injected into panes)
- Log: audit log entries for workflow execution tracing
- Abort: halt workflow with reason string
- Conditional: if/then/else branching on text matchers
- Loop: fixed iteration count with body steps and bounds enforcement

All new steps support nested validation with step depth limits.
Deterministic step ID assignment and execution ordering preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
